articles.title: Nine people in critical condition among 100 injured in fatal Bedford train crash
articles.description: British Transport Police says the collision, which killed a train driver, is being investigated.

articles.title: Talk of Starmer staying on to fight is fading - fast
articles.description: After Andy Burnham’s by-election victory, support for the prime minister is evaporating, writes Laura Kuenssberg.

articles.title: Extreme heat warning expanded as 36C heatwave approaches UK
articles.description: After a slightly cooler Saturday, temperatures will rise again, possibly touching 36C by Tuesday with a Met Office amber extreme heat warning set to come into force.

articles.title: Five injured in suspected anti-Muslim attacks as armed man roams Edinburgh streets
articles.description: Two people were injured close to a mosque and a man was later seen battering the door of a pizzeria as members of the public run away.
